question: Create a snapshot of the Ubuntu VM with the exact name LABO02_BASELINE_START using virsh.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if virsh snapshot-list ubuntu | grep -q "LABO02_BASELINE_START"; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Create a snapshot of the Rocky VM with the exact name LABO02_BASELINE_START using virsh.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if virsh snapshot-list rocky | grep -q "LABO02_BASELINE_START"; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Create a snapshot of the Windows VM with the exact name LABO02_BASELINE_START using VBoxManage.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if VBoxManage showvminfo "WindowsVM" --details | grep -iq "LABO02_BASELINE_START"; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi
